compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Automate the FFO rebase-to-tip-then-submit so parallel agent sessions stop hand-rolling it and racing; serialize so the tested tree is always the merged tree with no thrash. **This racing is a live, active pain on this repo.**

## What
A single-instance project service (Python, project infra ŌĆö NOT `src/rebar` core; `infra/autolander/loop.py` + a thin stdlib `infra/autolander/gerrit.py` helper) that, for the front `Autosubmit`+submittable change/chain: rebases to the current tip, awaits a fresh `Verified +1`, and ancestor-atomic submits the exact tested SHA. Holds a single in-flight `wipChain`.

**Poll cadence (design-fixed):** a fixed **15 s poll interval** (the "bot poll interval" S4/S5 reference) ŌĆö picks up a new `Autosubmit` within ~15 s while staying gentle on the Gerrit REST API; distinct from `land`'s 30 s client poll. The bot writes its liveness heartbeat once per poll (S5 AC5).

**`submittable` under FFO (design-fixed):** under ADR-0040, Gerrit's `submittable` already requires descendant-of-tip, so a behind-tip change is *non-submittable* (`submittable=false`); a native `submittable=false` doesn't say *why* (behind-tip vs a failing vote) ŌĆö the distinction S4's `needs_rebase` needs.

## Dependencies
Depends on **S1** (`sterilized-papery-horse`, 843b-801f-9ef9-442d) ŌĆö the `Autosubmit` label + its **requester-votable ACL** (granted to group `Contributors`; the loop casts no votes, only *selects on* `label:Autosubmit+1`). **Runtime-provisioning relationship with S5** (`perpetual-ultrasonic-raccoon`, 3c55-2af3-0c9c-4b11): S5 provisions the bot's live credentials + Gerrit capabilities (Submit ACL, `rebaseOnBehalfOfUploader`, SSM token) at deploy time. This is NOT a build-order `depends_on` (that would be circular ŌĆö S5 depends on S2 to have a loop to containerize); the grants are runtime preconditions satisfied by S5's deploy.

## Scope
The core serial loop ŌĆö decomposed into child tasks so each is loadable whole. **Failure paths** (CI-fail / rebase-conflict hand-back) are S3; deploy is S5; the agent command is S4.

## Acceptance Criteria (story-level; children carry the implementation detail)
- [ ] **Selection + rebase-routing** ŌĆö child **S2a** (`89f9-b381-60e2-4802`): FIFO selection, RelatedChanges detection, rebase vs `rebase:chain` vs single-change routing, `rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader`, and the stdlib Gerrit helper.
- [ ] **Serialization + safety** ŌĆö child **S2b** (`a9e3-580c-409c-4eee`): the single `wipChain` state machine, the FFO TOCTOU guard, the bounded `N=5` re-drive, and the CQ-style stack hand-back.
- [ ] **Land the tested tree** ŌĆö child **S2c** (`1ccf-ca1e-f832-452e`): fresh `Verified` on every rebased chain member's own SHA, and the ancestor-atomic `POST /submit` on the tip.
- [ ] The bot reads existing `Verified` votes only and casts NO votes (no gate-semantics change in Phase 1) ŌĆö the R5 invariant (tested tree = merged tree) holds across all three children.
compiled_state.title: S2 Serial auto-lander core loop (rebase:chain -> await Verified -> ancestor-atomic submit)
